releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description: fix: replace createEl h4 with setHeading in setup guide

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
Features:
- Setup wizard: admin vs auxiliar mode selection
- Connection code sharing (MA:v1:base64 format)
- Step-by-step setup guide for admins (collapsible)
- Copy tutorial buttons for WhatsApp sharing
- Sync interval included in connection code
- Auto-detect existing users as admin

Fixes:
- startSync() stops existing SyncManager before creating new one
- configure() rejects invalid/HTTP URLs
- restUpsert/joinVault route through api() for 401 retry
- logout handlers call stopSync()
- 'Cambiar modo' requires double-click confirmation
- sessionExpired reset on login/signup/refresh
- isVaultAdmin IIFE removed from render (now lazy)
- onSessionExpired callback auto-clears data.json
- Settings banner when session expired

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description: fix: remove 80-char truncation on visit summary in share export

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
## 0.4.0 — Vista Unificada + Edicion + Exportar + Informe

### Nuevo
- Dashboard unificado: reportes embebidos con navegacion interna, clic derecho abre en nueva pestana
- Edicion de registros desde el detalle del modal (Visitas, Vida Comunitaria, Proceso Educativo)
- Exportar: modal con filtros por tipo, ciclo y sector; share nativo en mobile, clipboard en desktop
- Informe general: genera nota Markdown exportable a PDF con KPIs, desglose por sector y actividades destacadas
- Compartir registro individual al guardar con confirmacion 'Solo guardar' / 'Compartir'
- Buscador en modales de listado (RecordList y PersonList)

### Fixes
- Maestros participantes muestra lista de nombres unicos, no las visitas
- Campo asist_simpatizantes opcional ya no rompe el render de KPIs
- ConfirmModal con labels configurables

### Refactor
- report-utils.ts: selectores de ciclo, sector, busqueda, KPIs y context menu compartidos
- PersonListModal, ExportModal, share.ts, informe.ts nuevos
